description: Complete merged mapping pack for EhLib VCL controls. Combines the original base pack with supplemental entries covering data-aware label, datetime edit, calculator edit, popup date picker, and standalone lookup control.

rules.notes: Plain text entry can map to TEdit. Edit buttons, masks, lookup behavior, and validation require review.
Visual edit can map to TEdit, but data binding and EhLib validation require review.
rules.manual_review_reason: Verify DataSource/DataField conversion and LiveBindings output.

rules.notes: Basic item list can map. MRU, edit buttons, lookup behavior, and custom dropdowns require review.
Combo box UI can map, but DB value semantics require review.
rules.manual_review_reason: Verify field values, lookup lists, and LiveBindings.

rules.notes: Date editor UI can map. Time, null value, mask, and DB semantics require review.
rules.manual_review_reason: Verify date/time formatting and data binding.

rules.notes: Plain edit generated. Numeric formatting, display masks, and DB semantics require review.
Checkbox UI can map. DB checked/unchecked values require review.

rules.manual_review_reason: EhLib DBGrid has rich columns, editors, footers, filters, and data behavior requiring a grid-specific migration plan.
Vertical data grid requires manual redesign.
Lookup key/display/list-source semantics are too application-specific for automatic conversion.
Lookup list semantics require manual migration.
In-memory dataset may need FireDAC TFDMemTable or another FMX-compatible replacement; review fields, indexes, and persistence.
Dataset driver/update behavior requires data-layer review.
Planner controls require manual scheduler/data migration.
Data-aware planner controls require manual scheduler/data migration.

rules.notes: Data-aware label maps to FMX TLabel for display. DataSource and DataField binding requires LiveBindings review.
rules.manual_review_reason: Verify DataSource/DataField conversion and LiveBindings output for label field display.

rules.notes: Datetime edit maps partially to FMX TDateEdit. Time portion, null value handling, mask formatting, and DB binding require review.
rules.manual_review_reason: Verify date/time formatting, null date behavior, and DataSource/DataField if data-aware.

rules.notes: Calculator-style edit maps to plain TEdit for text entry. Popup calculator, numeric formatting, and validation are not recreated.
rules.manual_review_reason: Replace calculator popup with a custom numeric input approach or TSpinBox/TNumberBox with appropriate range and format.

rules.notes: Popup date picker maps to FMX TDateEdit for basic date display and selection. Popup calendar customization and time handling require review.
rules.manual_review_reason: Verify popup behavior, date formatting, and time portion handling after conversion.
EhLib standalone lookup control with dataset/key/display semantics requires manual FMX redesign. Consider a TComboBox with LiveBindings lookup or a custom FMX lookup editor.
